name: Turkey Gravy - (by Gladys Daniels)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour drippings into a measuring cup.
2. Add enough water to make 1 cup liquid.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, poultry seasoning, and 1/4 cup water.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the liquid drippings in the measuring cup.
5. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly until gravy thickens.
The above recipe was developed and used by Gladys Pope Daniels of Kissimmee, Fla. The secret ingredient not listed was her love for her children.
